titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 99: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 99. (A.R. No. 379 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, Chōḷēśvara shrine, Agastyēsvara temple.

It records a gift of 96 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the northern shrine of the temple of Mahādēva of Avanigandharva-Īśvaragṛiham, Maṉṉupperumpaḻuvūr, a dēvadānam in Kuṉṟak-kūṟṟam by Śukaṉ Kaliyaṉ Araṅgaṉ for the merit of his wife Dēvaḍi Pugaḻaṟai, the daughter of Nāvalūr-uḍaiyāṉ Kaṇḍaṉ Dēvaḍi. The shepherds who received the sheep agreed to measure out an uḻakku of oil daily for the lamp. The nagarattār of Avanigandarvapuram agreed to protect the charity.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX, No. 308.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivarmmaṟku yāṇṭu Uttamacoḻa[deva*]ṟku yāṇṭu 10 2Āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu maṉṉup perumpaḻuvūr
devatāṉam Avaṉikkan=tarvva Īśvaragrahattu mahādevarkku vaṭavāy śrīkoyilukku nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭaṉ ṟevaṭi makaḷ tevaṭi pukaḻaṟaikku Ivaḷ
bharttā cukaṉ kaliyaṉ Araṅkaṉ Iddevarkku Iravum pakalum Eriya vaitta noṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku nicatam ney nārāyattāl ce Uḻakkukku vaitta
cāvāmuvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟu Ivvāṭu koṇṭom maṟavaṉ neṟi maṉṟāṭi muṇṭaṉ caṅkaṉum tāḻi Eṟaṉum periyāṉ caṭaiyaṉum pe
riyāṉ picaṅkaṉum kecaṉ maḻapāṭiyum kavaripurattu maṉṟāṭi vaṭukaṉ vaiykāvaṭikaḷum kuṉṟa kaṇṇaṉum centaṉ vaṭukaṉum kaṇṇan Eḻuvaṉ Ivaṉai vo
m Iṉṉey Aṭṭuvomānom Ivvaṉaivom Itdhanmam rakṣippar Avanikandharvvapurattu nakarattār panmāheśvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
